# vibe-gatekeeper

> Telegram gatekeeper bot (aiogram 3) + FastAPI admin web for community onboarding: applications, vouching, intro refresh, and admin/member visibility. Python 3.12, SQLAlchemy 2 async, PostgreSQL, Redis, deployed as GHCR images via Coolify.

## Overview
- [README](./README.md): Local setup, env layout, GHCR image names (80 LOC)
- [CLAUDE.md](./CLAUDE.md): AI assistant instructions for this repo
- [SPEC.md](./SPEC.md): Product spec (347 LOC — has known drift, see §7 auth and §1 test list; cross-check against code)
- [Runbook](./docs/runbook.md): Authoritative ops state — environment model, Coolify resources, prod cutover log (2026-04-20), rollback procedure (135 LOC)
- [Project Health Report](./docs/superflow/project-health-report.md): Phase 0 audit — 45 findings, prioritized tech debt (155 LOC)

## Core Source

The bot is the primary service (aiogram 3 long polling). The web app is a thin FastAPI admin surface for dashboards and member search. Both share `bot.db` models and `bot.config` settings — web imports from bot, never the reverse.

- [Bot entry](./bot/__main__.py): Builds aiogram `Bot`+`Dispatcher`, installs `DbSessionMiddleware`, registers 7 routers, picks `MemoryStorage` (DEV) vs `RedisStorage` (prod), starts APScheduler on startup (95 LOC)
- [Bot config](./bot/config.py): `pydantic-settings` `Settings` class; `.env` → env vars. DEV_MODE gates SQLite + in-memory FSM
- [Bot handlers](./bot/handlers/): 7 routers — start/questionnaire/vouch/admin/chat_events/forward_lookup/chat_messages (7 files, ~1,049 LOC)
- [Questionnaire FSM](./bot/handlers/questionnaire.py): 7-question onboarding flow (290 LOC — largest handler)
- [Vouch flow](./bot/handlers/vouch.py): "Ручаюсь" callback, double-vouch race protection (169 LOC)
- [Chat events](./bot/handlers/chat_events.py): join/leave/kick on community chat (211 LOC)
- [DB models](./bot/db/models.py): SQLAlchemy 2 `DeclarativeBase` — users, applications, intros, vouch_log, questionnaire_answers, chat_messages (148 LOC)
- [DB engine](./bot/db/engine.py): async engine + `async_sessionmaker` (12 LOC)
- [DB repos](./bot/db/repos/): 6 repository modules — user, application, questionnaire, vouch, intro, message (6 files, ~411 LOC)
- [Sheets sync](./bot/services/sheets.py): `gspread` (sync) Google Sheets adapter; 5-min scheduler job (largest file)
- [Scheduler](./bot/services/scheduler.py): APScheduler `AsyncIOScheduler` — vouch-deadline, intro-refresh, sheets-sync jobs; all jobs run via `_run_with_session()` helper
- [Invite service](./bot/services/invite.py): one-time invite link generation (47 LOC)
- [Telegram utils](./bot/utils/telegram.py): `mention_for(user)` — returns `@username` or first_name fallback; duck-typed, works with aiogram and SQLAlchemy user objects
- [DB session middleware](./bot/middlewares/db_session.py): aiogram middleware injecting `AsyncSession` per update
- [Texts](./bot/texts.py): All user-facing Russian strings, centralized (133 LOC)
- [Filters](./bot/filters/chat_type.py): `ChatType` filter for private / group routing
- [Keyboards](./bot/keyboards/inline.py): Inline button factories + `CallbackData` prefixes
- [States](./bot/states/questionnaire.py): `StatesGroup` for the 7-question FSM

## Web Admin

- [Web entry](./web/__main__.py): uvicorn on `0.0.0.0:8080`, imports `create_app` (7 LOC)
- [Web factory](./web/app.py): `create_app` — FastAPI instance, auth middleware (redirects unauth to `/login`), mounts `/static`, includes 3 routers (58 LOC)
- [Auth](./web/auth.py): Password + `itsdangerous.URLSafeTimedSerializer` cookie signer (34 LOC — NOTE: `SPEC.md §7` has an italic note acknowledging the Widget spec was not built; actual is password form)
- [Login route](./web/routes/auth.py): GET/POST `/login`, cookie set; slowapi rate-limit: `LOGIN_RATE_LIMIT_PER_15M` (default 5) attempts per 15 min per client IP; uses X-Forwarded-For for proxy-aware key (sprint-2)
- [Web session DI](./web/dependencies.py): `get_session()` FastAPI Depends helper — yields `AsyncSession` with commit/rollback lifecycle; used by all route handlers
- [Dashboard](./web/routes/dashboard.py): Funnel stats — applications by status; uses `Depends(get_session)`
- [Members](./web/routes/members.py): Member list + name search; uses `Depends(get_session)`
- [Web config](./web/config.py): Re-uses `bot.config.settings` (3 LOC — duplicate instantiation is a known smell)
- [Templates](./web/templates/): 4 Jinja2 templates — base, login, dashboard, members (HTML + Bootstrap 5 CDN, no build step)
- [Static](./web/static/style.css): Minimal overrides on top of Bootstrap CDN

## Data & Migrations

- [Alembic env](./alembic/env.py): Reads `DATABASE_URL`; rewrites `postgresql://` → `postgresql+asyncpg://` for offline mode (62 LOC)
- [Initial migration](./alembic/versions/001_initial.py): All tables in one revision — mirrors `bot.db.models` (143 LOC)
- [Alembic config](./alembic.ini): Script location, logging config
- Note: In DEV mode, `bot/__main__.py:22-29` calls `Base.metadata.create_all` instead of running Alembic — drift risk (see health report)

## Testing

- [Tests dir](./tests/): 12 test files, 52 tests total — pytest collects from `tests/` only
- [conftest](./tests/conftest.py): fixtures — `app_env` (env monkeypatch), `session_factory_sqlite` (in-memory SQLite async sessionmaker), `aiogram_bot_mock` (AsyncMock Bot), `chat_member_factory`, `message_factory`, `callback_query_factory`
- [test_chat_events](./tests/test_chat_events.py): 11 tests — join/leave handler logic and DB side-effects
- [test_intro_refresh](./tests/test_intro_refresh.py): 5 tests — intro refresh scheduler job
- [test_questionnaire](./tests/test_questionnaire.py): 7 tests — FSM onboarding flow
- [test_scheduler](./tests/test_scheduler.py): 7 tests — vouch-deadline and sheets-sync jobs
- [test_sheets_sync](./tests/test_sheets_sync.py): 6 tests — Google Sheets sync logic
- [test_vouch](./tests/test_vouch.py): 6 tests — vouch callback and race protection
- [test_settings](./tests/test_settings.py): 1 test — config/settings loading
- [test_web_app](./tests/test_web_app.py): 1 test — FastAPI app factory
- [test_web_auth](./tests/test_web_auth.py): 2 tests — web auth flow
- [test_display_name](./tests/test_display_name.py): 3 tests — `_display_name()` helper in members route (sprint-2)
- [test_login_rate_limit](./tests/test_login_rate_limit.py): 3 tests — slowapi /login rate-limit and per-IP X-Forwarded-For bucketing (sprint-2)
- Run: `pytest -q` (testpaths pinned to `tests/` in pyproject — root-level `test_*.py` files are NOT collected)
- Note: `pytest-asyncio` is not in dev deps; async code in tests is wrapped in `asyncio.run()` inside sync test functions

## Configuration

- [pyproject.toml](./pyproject.toml): Dependencies, ruff config (line-length 100, py312), pytest config, `[dev]` + `[ops]` extras (49 LOC)
- [Env example](./.env.example): 12 required env vars — `BOT_TOKEN`, `COMMUNITY_CHAT_ID`, `ADMIN_IDS`, `DATABASE_URL`, `REDIS_URL`, `GOOGLE_SHEETS_CREDS_FILE`, `GOOGLE_SHEET_ID`, `WEB_BASE_URL`, `WEB_BOT_USERNAME`, `DB_PASSWORD`, `WEB_PASSWORD`, `DEV_MODE`; plus 4 optional sprint-2 vars (commented out): `INTRO_NUDGE_PHASE_1_MAX`, `INTRO_NUDGE_PHASE_2_MAX`, `LOGIN_RATE_LIMIT_PER_15M`, `TRUSTED_PROXY_HOSTS`
- [Staging env](./.env.staging.example): Same key set, staging-specific values
- [Production env](./.env.production.example): Same key set, prod-specific values
- [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml): 4 services — bot, web, db (`postgres:16-alpine`, healthcheck), redis (`redis:7-alpine`)
- [Dockerfile.bot](./Dockerfile.bot): Bot container — multi-stage build, non-root `app` user, HEALTHCHECK via `/tmp/bot-heartbeat` file (sprint-2); runs `alembic upgrade head && python -m bot`
- [Dockerfile.web](./Dockerfile.web): Web container — multi-stage build, non-root `app` user, HEALTHCHECK via `curl /login` (sprint-2); runs `python -m web` on port 8080

## Infrastructure

- [CI](./.github/workflows/ci.yml): `pytest -q` + `ruff check .` + `ruff format --check .` on PR and push to main/master (44 LOC)
- [Release](./.github/workflows/release.yml): Triggered on successful CI on main; builds `Dockerfile.bot` + `Dockerfile.web`, pushes `sha-<hash>` + `:main` tags to `ghcr.io/jekudy/vibe-gatekeeper-{bot,web}` (67 LOC)
- Deploy target: Coolify (watches `:main`); prod cutover completed 2026-04-20 — see `docs/runbook.md`
- [.gitignore](./.gitignore): Covers `.env`, `.venv`, caches, `.worktrees/`, build artifacts

## Documentation

- [SPEC.md](./SPEC.md): Product intent (347 LOC). Known drift: §7 web-auth section still describes a Telegram Login Widget that was never built, but now carries an implementation-differs note (sprint-2); §1 structure diagram and test list updated to match reality (sprint-2)
- [Runbook](./docs/runbook.md): Coolify resource table, prod cutover log, rollback procedure (authoritative ops source)
- [Coolify preflight](./docs/ops/coolify-preflight.md): VPS preparation checklist (92 LOC)
- [Staging cutover (historical)](./docs/ops/vibe-gatekeeper-staging-cutover.md): Superseded by the 2026-04-20 prod cutover in runbook.md (68 LOC)
- [VPS/GHCR/Coolify plan](./docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-12-vps-git-ghcr-coolify.md): Original migration plan (143 LOC)
- [VPS/GHCR/Coolify design](./docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-12-vps-git-ghcr-coolify-design.md): Design spec for the same (184 LOC)
- [Knowledge-layer plan](./docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-19-coolify-knowledge-layer.md): Implementation plan (1,214 LOC)
- [Knowledge-layer design](./docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-19-coolify-knowledge-layer-design.md): Knowledge-layer spec (301 LOC)
- [Project Health Report](./docs/superflow/project-health-report.md): Phase 0 Superflow audit — 45 findings across architecture / security / docs / devops

## Optional

- Note: undocumented ops scripts at repo root (not packaged by setuptools, excluded from pytest collection):
  - [`phone_login.py`](./phone_login.py): Telethon user-mode login helper (87 LOC)
  - [`scan_work.py`](./scan_work.py): Telethon ops script — chat scanning (74 LOC)
  - [`transcribe_voice.py`](./transcribe_voice.py): Telethon voice-message transcription helper (56 LOC)
  - [`test_all.py`](./test_all.py): Manual Telethon end-to-end smoke script — needs `TELEGRAM_SESSION` / `TELEGRAM_API_ID`; not collected by pytest (219 LOC)
  - [`test_flow.py`](./test_flow.py): Manual Telethon flow script (84 LOC)
  - All five require the `[ops]` extra (`telethon>=1.39`) from `pyproject.toml:32`
